_licenseInfo.text: This adapter requires a valid license key to operate. The license is bound to your hardware for security purposes.

licenseKey.label: License Key
licenseKey.help: Contact gokturk413 for a valid license key

_licenseWarning.text: ⚠️ Important: License keys are cryptographically bound to hardware IDs. To add a new computer, contact gokturk413 with your Hardware ID.

_hardwareIdInfo.text: ℹ️ Your Hardware ID will be shown in the adapter logs on first start. You cannot manually add hardware IDs - they are encrypted in the license key.

_instructions.text:
1. Start the adapter (it will fail on first run)
2. Check logs: iobroker logs webui --lines 50
3. Copy your Hardware ID from logs
4. Send Hardware ID to gokturk413 to get a license
5. Enter the license key here
6. Restart the adapter

💡 To add another computer: Send its Hardware ID to get an updated license key.
